metadata.track_name: 实施平台微内核 Wave 1 的 contract、composer 与 ownership 收口
metadata.goal: 建立第一版 platform contract、platform composer contract 与 ownership tables，作为后续 profile/shell/package 波次的正式基线。

phase.name: Ownership Freeze
phase.goal: 将 Wave 1 所需的 contract ownership、runtime facet 与 package mapping 先冻结成正式表格。

task.name: 产出 contract ownership table
task.description: 明确 platform contract 与 AI domain contract 的正式 ownership 边界。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: contract ownership table 覆盖当前关键 core/composer/organ 边界
AI-shaped surface 的迁出方向明确

task.name: 产出 runtime facet 与 package mapping table
task.description: 明确 `AiAgentVm` 的 platform/domain facet 归属，以及现有包的目标职责。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: runtime facet table 明确 platform/domain 切分
package mapping table 明确现有包的新职责

phase.name: Composer Contract Cutover
phase.goal: 将 `@cell/composer` contract 收口为平台级 capability composition contract。

task.name: 重构 platform composer contract
task.description: 调整 `RuntimeAssemblyContext/State/Result` 及相关 contract，移除直接 AI-shaped 依赖。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: composer contract 不再直接依赖 `AgentConfig` / `ToolSchema`
AI domain assembly contribution 有正式边界位置

task.name: 为 composer contract 兼容过渡提供最小适配
task.description: 在不引入第二真相源的前提下，为现有 AI runtime 保留最小兼容过渡层。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 现有 runtime 仍可通过正式 composer contract 路径运行
未新建平行 composer truth source

phase.name: Focused Verification
phase.goal: 通过 focused verification 锁定 ownership 与 AI runtime 连续可运行。

task.name: 补齐 ownership 与 composer focused tests
task.description: 补充验证 composer ownership、contract ownership 与 AI-shaped surface 退出方向的 focused tests。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: focused tests 验证行为和 ownership，而非源码 grep
composer/platform contract 边界具备自动化保护

task.name: 验证当前 AI runtime 主路径连续可运行
task.description: 确认 terminal/tui/headless 主路径在 Wave 1 结束时仍可运行。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: tui/headless 主路径未被本波次打断
